title: Observability Entry
description: Signals, dashboards, and telemetry patterns that look useful right up until someone asks for an answer.

category.description: Category slug used in API paths.

tags.description: Searchable tags for browsing and filtering.

created_at.description: Initial publication date in ISO local date form.

updated_at.description: Most recent update date in ISO local date form.

signal.description: What the system appeared to be telling you.

false_signal.description: Why that signal was comforting but wrong.

actual_problem.description: The thing that was really broken.

confidence_gap.description: Why the team felt informed without actually knowing.
